title: (No AI) AI influencer awards season is upon us
author: Robert Hart
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/STK414_AI_CVIRGINIA_I__0001_11.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

First came the AI beauty pageant. Then the AI music contests. Now, there is an award for AI Personality of the Year - perhaps the inevitable next step for the AI influencer economy as it fights for legitimacy amid an onslaught of AI slop and grifters and transforms from quirky novelty into a serious and lucrative industry.

The contest, a joint venture between generative AI studio OpenArt and AI-powered creator platform Fanvue, with backing from AI voice company ElevenLabs, opens on Monday and runs for a month. The organizers said it is intended to "celebrate the creative talent 'behind' AI Influencers" and recognize their growing commercial …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/898781/ai-personality-of-the-year-influencer-contest)

The contest, a joint venture between generative AI studio OpenArt and AI-powered creator platform Fanvue, with backing from AI voice company ElevenLabs, opens on Monday and runs for a month. The organizers said it is intended to "celebrate the creative talent 'behind' AI Influencers" and recognize their growing commercial …

title: (No AI) Crimson Desert dev apologizes for use of AI art
author: Terrence O’Brien
content:
![A screenshot from Crimson Desert showing what appears to be an AI-generated painting.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/found-this-ai-painting-v0-otfba7ufh8qg1.webp?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

That’s some sloppy looking slop. | Image: Rex\_Spy / Reddit

Reviews of _Crimson Desert_ [have](https://gamerant.com/crimson-desert-review/) [been](https://www.ign.com/articles/crimson-desert-review) [mixed](https://gameinformer.com/review/crimson-desert/open-world-overload), but the bigger issue for the game has been the discovery of what [appeared](https://www.reddit.com/r/PS5/comments/1rz5qfb/crimson_desert_appears_to_use_generative_ai/) to be [AI-generated assets](https://www.ign.com/articles/crimson-desert-players-think-theyve-found-ai-generated-art-in-game) in the [final](https://www.reddit.com/r/CrimsonDesert/comments/1rz2f2l/found_this_ai_painting/?utm_source=embedv2&utm_medium=post_embed&utm_content=post_body&embed_host_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ign.com%2Farticles%2Fcrimson-desert-players-think-theyve-found-ai-generated-art-in-game) release. Now the developer has acknowledged that AI art was indeed used during the game's creation, but says that it was intended to be replaced before release. In a [statement on X](https://x.com/crimsondesert_/status/2035718975909470706?s=46), the company said it was conducting a "comprehensive audit" to identify and replace any AI-generated content.

The company apologized for both its inclusion in the final release and for not being more transparent about its use during development. "We should have clearly disclosed our use of AI," it said.

The …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/games/898771/crimson-desert-dev-apologizes-ai-art)
contentSnippet:
That’s some sloppy looking slop. | Image: Rex_Spy / Reddit	

Reviews of Crimson Desert have been mixed, but the bigger issue for the game has been the discovery of what appeared to be AI-generated assets in the final release. Now the developer has acknowledged that AI art was indeed used during the game's creation, but says that it was intended to be replaced before release.  In a statement on X, the company said it was conducting a "comprehensive audit" to identify and replace any AI-generated content. 
The company apologized for both its inclusion in the final release and for not being more transparent about its use during development. "We should have clearly disclosed our use of AI," it said.
The …
Read the full story at The Verge.

Now the developer has acknowledged that AI art was indeed used during the game's creation, but says that it was intended to be replaced before release. […]

creator: Joel Khalili
title: (No AI) The AI Race Is Pressuring Utilities to Squeeze More From Europe’s Power Grids
